question: Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 2 & 5 \\ 1 & -1 \end{vmatrix}$
Find the value of $x$ if $\begin{vmatrix} x & 2 \\ 1 & 4 \end{vmatrix} = 10$
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 2 & 3 & 1 \\ -2 & 1 & 2 \\ 1 & 1 & 1 \end{vmatrix}$
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 3 & -4 & -3 \\ 2 & 0 & -1 \\ 5 & 0 & 2 \end{vmatrix}$
If $C$ is the mid-point of $\overline{AB}$ where $A(3, 5)$, $B(1, 7)$ find the coordinates of $C$.
In the triangle $ABC$ where $A(3, 2)$, $B(5, 0)$, $C(4, 4)$ and $M$ is the point of intersection of its medians find the coordinates of the point $M$.
If $A(3, 1)$, $B(-2, 5)$ find the coordinates of the point $C$ which divides $\vec{AB}$ internally by the ratio $2:3$.
If $A(2, 5)$, $B(7, -1)$ find the coordinates of the point $C$ which divides $\vec{AB}$ externally by the ratio $3:2$.
If $A(1, 3)$, $B(-4, -2)$ find the coordinates of the point $C$, where $C \in \vec{AB}$ and $3AC = 2CB$.
Find the ratio by which the x-axis divides $\overline{AB}$ where $A(-4, 3)$, $B(8, 6)$ and determine type of division.
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 3 & 4 \\ 2 & 3 \end{vmatrix}$
Find the value of $x$ if $\begin{vmatrix} x & -2 \\ 5 & 3 \end{vmatrix} = 16$
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 5 & -1 & 2 \\ 3 & 0 & 1 \\ 2 & -1 & 4 \end{vmatrix}$
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} -1 & 0 & 2 \\ 1 & 0 & 1 \\ 3 & 5 & 4 \end{vmatrix}$
If $C$ is the mid-point of $\overline{AB}$ where $A(2, 9)$, $B(4, 5)$ find the coordinates of $C$.
In the triangle $ABC$ where $A(4, 5)$, $B(2, 6)$, $C(3, 7)$ and $M$ is the point of intersection of its medians find the coordinates of the point $M$.
If $A(-3, -7)$, $B(4, 0)$ find the coordinates of the point $C$ which divides $\vec{AB}$ internally by the ratio $5:2$.
If $A(2, 3)$, $B(5, 6)$ find the coordinates of the point $C$ which divides $\vec{AB}$ externally by the ratio $1:2$.
If $A(-1, 4)$, $B(3, 4)$ find the coordinates of the point $C$, where $C \in \vec{AB}$ and $AB = 4BC$.
Find the ratio by which the x-axis divides $\overline{AB}$ where $A(2, 5)$, $B(7, -2)$ and determine type of division.
find the value of $x$ if $\begin{vmatrix} x & 1 \\ 2 & 3 \end{vmatrix} = 4$.
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 2 & 5 \\ 2 & 0 & 1 \\ 5 & 0 & -1 \end{vmatrix}$.
Solve the right angled triangle $ABC$ at $B$ if $BC = 3 \text{ cm}$, $AC = 5 \text{ cm}$.
If $C$ is the mid point of $\overline{AB}$ where $A(1, 2)$, $B(7, 8)$, find the coordinates of the point $C$.
find the value of $x$ if $\begin{vmatrix} x & 2 \\ 3 & 5 \end{vmatrix} = 11$.
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 2 & 2 & 5 \\ 1 & 2 & 0 \\ -1 & 3 & 0 \end{vmatrix}$.
Solve the right angled triangle $ABC$ at $B$ if $AB = 9 \text{ cm}$, $BC = 12 \text{ cm}$.
If $C$ is the mid point of $\overline{AB}$ where $A(7, 12)$, $B(5, 2)$, find the coordinates of the point $C$.
find the value of $x$ if $\begin{vmatrix} x & -2 \\ 4 & 3 \end{vmatrix} = 20$.
Find the value of $\begin{vmatrix} 0 & 1 & 3 \\ 1 & 2 & -4 \\ 0 & 3 & 4 \end{vmatrix}$.
Solve the right angled triangle $ABC$ at $B$ if $AB = 24 \text{ cm}$, $BC = 7 \text{ cm}$.
If $C$ is the mid point of $\overline{AB}$ where $A(8, 5)$, $B(4, 5)$, find the coordinates of the point $C$.
